claim.summary: A single live delegated queue window combined ordinary built-in intake, git-backed shared-repo work, and a real SIGINT interruption/resume of a git-backed repo_sandbox task, completing all eight jobs with trusted clean evidence and no active lease residue.

code_changes: No production code change was required for r14.
r14 adds a temporary isolated external manifest and proof driver under /tmp to combine ordinary intake, git-backed work, and real restart/resume in one queue window.

isolated_cli_r14.preflight_mode: drain --enforce-preflight 0 because host bubblewrap preflight is unavailable in this environment
isolated_cli_r14.git_policy: git disabled for ordinary built-in jobs; git enabled only for repo_sandbox/git-backed phases via --allow-git-commands 1

open_limits: This is a 51-second combined role proof, not a multi-hour or multi-day production-duty role.
The proof combines ordinary intake, git-backed work, and real restart/resume, but it is still bounded by curated task-bank and one external manifest task.
The host environment lacks working bubblewrap preflight, so this packet uses the same explicit --enforce-preflight 0 live-drain path as r10 through r13.
A stronger full A5 claim still needs longer wall-clock role continuity, less curated intake, and natural role closeout without operator steering.
